phase_1_rationale: Candidate B is much cleaner overall. It refactors the duplicated GraphQL struct definitions in SuggestedAssignableActors into a single suggestedActorNode type, simplifies the boolean logic determining whether to fetch assignees, and cleans up the searchFunc implementations.

phase_1_semantic_concerns.A: Duplicates GraphQL structure in SuggestedAssignableActors which is bad practice. Contains overly verbose variable assignments and boolean logic checks.
